calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc. Dba Ipo Architects Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:00 pm and concluding at 2:10 pm.

Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc. appearing represented by Alexa Stephenson Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Treasure Technologies is not present.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Nobrainermarketers Inc., and against Defendant Treasure Technologies.

1. Damages $100.00

Total Judgment $100.00

Counsel for plaintiff to submit Proposed Judgment for Courts review and signature. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc. Dba Ipo Architects Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Continued To Aug-18-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc. Dba Ipo Architects Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Continued To Jul-20-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:02:38 a.m., pausing at 11:07:10 a.m., reconvening at 11:24:07 a.m., and concluding at 11:41:25 a.m.

Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc. a Delaware Coprporation DBA IPO Architects represented by Alexa Stephenson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Treasure Technologis Inc., a Delaware Corporation not appearing.

The following exhibits are MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Complaint filed 12/29/2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Declaration of Nehemiah Chu in Support of Plaintiff Nobrainermarketers Inc.'s Request for Court Judgment

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - Agreement Dated and Signed 09/02/2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Letter to Treasure Technologies, Inc. Dated 10/19/2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Letter to Treasure Technologies, Inc. Dated 12/22/2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Master Services Agreement

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court finds that prayer in complaint and amount in proposed judgment are inconsistent. Amount in proposed judgment exceeds Plaintiff's prayer in its complaint. Plaintiff is limited to the amount indicated in its prayer.

NEHEMIAH CHU is under direct examination and is examined by the Court.
Court determines there were no services rendered and no payments were made.

Counsel for shall Plainiff shall file a supplemental declaration to address the Court's concerns. The declaration shall address e-mails or evidence to support any time spent preparing for the kick off of the event, quanitifcation in terms of monetary amounts associated with that, and additional correspondence and services agreed upon by the parties.

Court to research whether there can be an award of damages because there was no payment in exchange for no services, even when the Defendant is default status.

Court orders matter continued to July 20, 2023 at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505 for further hearing. Counsel for Plaintiff shall deliver a courtesy copy of supplemental briefing in advance of the next hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
